xuecheng-plus-parent/pom.xml.general_idea: Revert maven-compiler-plugin source and target settings from 21 back to 1.8 to align with the declared java.version property.
Add the 'release' flag to the maven-compiler-plugin configuration to enforce API compatibility with JDK 8.
Explicitly set the compiler encoding to UTF-8 in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration.
Add maven.compiler.source and maven.compiler.target properties to the POM to standardize version configuration.
